data.name: CalcPayerInfoValues.Expression
data.value: Iif([TransactionTypeEnglish] == 'DEPOSIT', Iif(Len(Trim([PayerName])) > 30, Substring([PayerName],0,29), [PayerName]) + Char(13) + Iif(Len(Trim([DeptBankName])) > 30, Substring([DeptBankName],0,29), [DeptBankName]) + Char(13) + Iif(Len(Trim([AccountNumber])) > 30, Substring([AccountNumber],0,29), [AccountNumber]) , [PayerName])

data.name: CalcSenderInfo.Expression
data.value: Iif(Len([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndFullName]) > 33, Substring([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndFullName], 0, 33), [WireSearchReceiptV1.SndFullName]) + Char(13) + Iif(Len([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndAddress]) > 33, Substring([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndAddress], 0, 33), [WireSearchReceiptV1.SndAddress]) + Iif(Len([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndAddress]) > 0, Char(13) + Iif(Len(Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCity]) + ', ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndState]) + ' '+ Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndZip]) + ' ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCountry])) > 33, Substring(Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCity]) + ', ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndState]) + ' '+ Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndZip]) + ' ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCountry]),0,33), Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCity]) + ', ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndState]) + ' '+ Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndZip]) + ' ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCountry])) , Iif(Len(Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCity]) + ', ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndState]) + ' '+ Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndZip]) + ' ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCountry])) > 66, Substring(Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCity]) + ', ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndState]) + ' '+ Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndZip]) + ' ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCountry]),0,66), Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCity]) + ', ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndState]) + ' '+ Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndZip]) + ' ' + Trim([WireSearchReceiptV1.SndCountry])) )

data.name: CalcRcvInfo.Expression
data.value: Iif(Len(Trim([RcvFullName])) > 39, Substring([RcvFullName],0,38), [RcvFullName]) + Char(13) + Iif(Len(Trim([RcvAddress])) > 39, Substring([RcvAddress],0,38), [RcvAddress]) + Iif(Len(Trim([RcvAddress])) > 0 , Char(13) + Iif(Len(Trim([RcvCity]) + ', ' + Trim([RcvState]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvZip]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvCountry])) > 39, Substring(Trim([RcvCity]) + ', ' + Trim([RcvState]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvZip]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvCountry]),0,38), Trim([RcvCity]) + ', ' + Trim([RcvState]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvZip]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvCountry])) , Iif(Len(Trim([RcvCity]) + ', ' + Trim([RcvState]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvZip]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvCountry])) > 78, Substring(Trim([RcvCity]) + ', ' + Trim([RcvState]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvZip]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvCountry]),0,77), Trim([RcvCity]) + ', ' + Trim([RcvState]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvZip]) + ' ' + Trim([RcvCountry]) + Char(13) + Char(13)) )

data.name: CalcAgInfo.Expression
data.value: 'Agencia/Agency: ' + [AgencyCode] + Char(13) + 'Fecha/Date: ' + [WireDatetime] + Char(13) + 'Procesado por/Rep: ' + [CreatedBy] + Char(13) + 'Tel Desde/Caller ID: ' + [IncomingPhoneNumber] + Char(13) + Iif([Parameters.Control]!=0, 'Control: ' + [Parameters.Control] + ' ','') + 'Wire #: ' + [AgSenderSeq]

data.name: CalcReplaInfo.Expression
data.value: Iif([PendingBeneficiaryChange] = True, [BeneficiaryChangeDisclaimerS], [ReplacementWireDisclaimerS] )+ Char(13) + Iif([PendingBeneficiaryChange] = True, [BeneficiaryChangeDisclaimerE], [ReplacementWireDisclaimerE] ) + iif([PendingBeneficiaryChange]= False, Char(13) +'Puede variar por fecha de cancelación giro original.' + Char(13) + 'May vary based on original wire cancellation date.', '')

data.name: CalcDepositInfoLabel.Expression
data.value: Iif([TransactionTypeEnglish] == 'DEPOSIT', Iif(Not IsNullOrEmpty([CPF]),' CPF: ' + [CPF], '') + Char(13) + Iif(Not IsNullOrEmpty([BeneficiaryId]),'Benef. Id: ' + [BeneficiaryId],'') + Char(13) + Iif(Not IsNullOrEmpty([AccountTypeSpanish]),'Tipo/Type: ' + [AccountTypeSpanish] + '/ ' + [AccountTypeEnglish],''), '')
